prompt: Scaffold a new Go service called orderd (module example.com/orderd) with our canonical layout: cmd entrypoint, a tools module for pinned developer CLIs, and a Makefile with the standard targets including the pr gate. Skeleton only — no business logic yet.
allowed_tools: Read Write Edit Glob Grep Skill Bash(go *) Bash(gofmt *) Bash(mkdir *)

prompt: Pin goreleaser (github.com/goreleaser/goreleaser/v2) as a developer tool in this repo and add a Makefile snapshot target that runs it, following our Go tooling conventions. Edit the files directly — no need to run go commands.
allowed_tools: Read Write Edit Glob Grep Skill Bash(go *) Bash(gofmt *) Bash(mkdir *)

files.Makefile:
license:
	go tool -modfile=tools/go.mod addlicense -f LICENSE -v cmd internal
